document.source_title: IPL 2026: ‘My last T20 will be in Chennai,’ MS Dhoni's retirement shadow looms over CSK's final league game

claims.claim_text: MS Dhoni has not played a single match in IPL 2026.
claims.evidence_text: MS Dhoni has not played a single match in IPL 2026.

claims.claim_text: Dhoni's last T20 will be in Chennai.
claims.evidence_text: I have always planned my cricket. ... So, hopefully, my last T20 will be in Chennai.

entities.name: MS Dhoni
entities.description: Former captain of the Chennai Super Kings and Indian cricket team.
entities.evidence_text: MS Dhoni has not played a single match in IPL 2026.

entities.name: Chennai Super Kings
entities.description: Franchise cricket team based in Chennai, Tamil Nadu.
entities.evidence_text: CSK had confirmed before the season that Dhoni was undergoing rehabilitation for a calf strain.

entities.name: Ravichandran Ashwin
entities.description: Indian cricketer who commented on Dhoni's potential return.
entities.evidence_text: Ashwin said he felt there was a good chance of Dhoni playing in Chennai.

entities.name: Michael Hussey
entities.evidence_text: CSK batting coach Michael Hussey later said Dhoni was batting well.

entities.name: Stephen Fleming
entities.evidence_text: Stephen Fleming then gave the clearest explanation for why the absence became prolonged.

events.event: CSK's final home game of IPL 2026
events.evidence_text: CSK are back at Chepauk for their final home game of IPL 2026.
